name: MARKEL GROUP INC.
business: Markel Group is a holding company that owns independently operated businesses across diverse industries. Its cornerstone is Markel Insurance, which provides specialized insurance products not typically available in the standard market. Other businesses operate in industrial, financial, and consumer sectors, including building products, precast concrete, fire protection, bakery equipment, and ornamental plants.
sellsTo: Large commercial fleets and independent car haulers
Wind energy, data center, semiconductor, nuclear, and space market contractors
Credit unions and banks (collateral protection insurance)

catalysts.event: U.S. classic car business transition from underwriting product to fronting arrangement for Hagerty
catalysts.sentence: Beginning on January 1, 2026, our U.S. classic car business, written on behalf of Hagerty, Inc., transitioned from being an underwriting product to a fronting arrangement.
